name: Style Obmd

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changed

- Optimized Live Preview decoration updates to reduce unnecessary rebuilds when moving the cursor within the same line.
- Reused CodeMirror mark decorations by CSS class to reduce short-lived allocations and memory pressure.

## Fixed

- Reduced extra work during cursor movement without changing the existing Live Preview behavior.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of Style Obmd for Obsidian.

Style Obmd adds customizable colors to highlights and bold text in Live Preview and Reading View. It also provides commands to convert styled Markdown into portable inline HTML.

See the [README](https://github.com/penyt/style-obmd#readme) for usage and installation instructions.
